desc: InkGames transforms your Supernote into a limitless puzzle book. It generates offline Sudoku, Mazes, WordSearch, and Nonograms designed for the authentic feel of pen and paper. Enjoy a minimalist, high-contrast interface optimized for E-ink, where you solve classic challenges with your digital stylus. No UI clutter—just you, your pen, and your logic.
name: InkGames
author: WolfSolver
